name: Santa's Chocolate Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In the top of a double boiler, combine chocolate, water, instant coffee, and salt. Heat over hot, not boiling, water just until the chocolate melts, stirring occasionally.
2. Pour a small amount of chocolate mixture into beaten egg yolks. Return to double boiler and cook for 3 minutes, stirring constantly.
3. Remove from heat. Stir in marshmallow creme and flavorings.
4. Chill. Fold in stiff-beaten egg whites, then whipped heavy cream.
5. Pour into cooled baked pastry shell. Freeze firm, 10 hours or overnight.
6. To match picture: When ready to serve, top with whipped cream and add swirls of candy canes poked into filling at a slant. Serve promptly.
